message:
fix(ci): use musl for Linux builds to fix GLIBC compatibility

Switch Linux release builds from glibc to musl (static linking) to
ensure binaries work on older Linux distributions like Ubuntu 22.04 LTS
which only has GLIBC 2.35 (binaries were compiled against GLIBC_2.39).

Changes:
- Linux x64: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu -> x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
- Linux ARM64: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu -> aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
- Remove separate linux_amd64_musl variant (now the default)
- Add musl-tools installation for both architectures

Closes #36

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -72,22 +72,18 @@ jobs:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         include:
-          # Linux x64 (glibc)
-          - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
-            os: ubuntu-latest
-            archive: tar.gz
-            name: linux_amd64
-          # Linux x64 (musl, static)
+          # Linux x64 (musl, static) - portable across all Linux distros
           - target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
             os: ubuntu-latest
             archive: tar.gz
-            name: linux_amd64_musl
+            name: linux_amd64
             musl: true
-          # Linux ARM64 (native runner - 10x faster than cross-compilation)
-          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+          # Linux ARM64 (musl, static) - portable across all Linux distros
+          - target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
             os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
             archive: tar.gz
             name: linux_arm64
+            musl: true
           # macOS Intel
           - target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             os: macos-15
@@ -115,8 +111,14 @@ jobs:
           toolchain: nightly
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
-      - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl)
-        if: matrix.musl
+      - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl x86_64)
+        if: matrix.musl && matrix.target == 'x86_64-unknown-linux-musl'
+        run: |
+          sudo apt-get update
+          sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools
+
+      - name: Install musl tools (Linux musl aarch64)
+        if: matrix.musl && matrix.target == 'aarch64-unknown-linux-musl'
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
           sudo apt-get install -y musl-tools
@@ -136,6 +138,10 @@ jobs:
         if: runner.os != 'Windows' && !matrix.musl
         run: ./target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/br --version
 
+      - name: Verify musl binary runs (Linux musl)
+        if: matrix.musl
+        run: ./target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/br --version
+
       - name: Verify binary runs (Windows)
         if: runner.os == 'Windows'
         run: ./target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/br.exe --version
@@ -298,9 +304,8 @@ jobs:
 
           | Platform | Architecture | File |
           |----------|--------------|------|
-          | Linux | x86_64 (glibc) | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-linux_amd64.tar.gz` |
-          | Linux | x86_64 (musl, static) | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-linux_amd64_musl.tar.gz` |
-          | Linux | ARM64 | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-linux_arm64.tar.gz` |
+          | Linux | x86_64 (musl, static) | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-linux_amd64.tar.gz` |
+          | Linux | ARM64 (musl, static) | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-linux_arm64.tar.gz` |
           | macOS | x86_64 (Intel) | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-darwin_amd64.tar.gz` |
           | macOS | ARM64 (Apple Silicon) | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-darwin_arm64.tar.gz` |
           | Windows | x86_64 | `br-${{ github.ref_name }}-windows_amd64.zip` |
